prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Material transitions, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: no dielectric union copper-to-steel. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IPC, mfr listings.
title: Identification: Material transitions (residential job)
